_readme: PHASE 3c TEMPO cycle: the ladder2 recipe (dense VP + ascend Φ + placement/farm/reward aux, gamma .999, PPO, 512 games/gen, 60 gens) PLUS two capabilities — (1) TEMPO: --win-bonus-halflife 8 decays the 30-VP win bonus by how late the win lands (round<=12 full, 20 half, 28 quarter), so the net is pushed to cross 30 EARLIER; (2) CONTENTION: selfPlayFraction 0.35 replaces a third of each generation's matchups with a pure mirror (all opponents = the learner's current ckpt), training equal-strength racing/denial on the shared ladder. NOTE: the win bonus fires for the FIRST time here — ladder2's `won` field was stamped but never serialized, so its --win-bonus 1.0 was inert.
